{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Jai Matriarch
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Jai Matriarch]] entered the [[Ruins]] and emerged weak and battered.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7">''Soulsmith'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
